Policy_Text: Covers emergency visits up to $500 and includes basic doctor consultation.
Covers emergency visits up to $750 and includes doctor consultation plus lab tests.
Covers routine dental checkups once per year and basic cleaning.
Covers routine dental checkups twice per year, basic cleaning, and X-ray services.
Covers one eye exam per year with partial coverage for prescription glasses.
Covers one eye exam per year with full coverage for prescription glasses up to $300.
Provides life insurance coverage up to $10000 for eligible employees.
Provides life insurance coverage up to $15000 for eligible employees and includes accidental death benefits.
Covers hospital admission for up to three days and emergency care.
Covers hospital admission for up to five days, emergency care, and follow-up visits.
